name: Broccoli Trees (Disney Kids)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a dip by combining the sour cream, mayonnaise, sugar, lemon juice, and basil in a medium-size mixing bowl.
2. Cut each carrot in half widthwise, then lengthwise into four pieces to create the tree trunks.
3. Assemble the trees on a plate by laying three carrot pieces side by side for the trunk and arranging the broccoli florets as leaves.
4. Spread the dip under the trunks to represent the forest floor.
